snippet.title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb

localized.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
localized.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it

snippet.title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
snippet.description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

snippet.title: ROBLOX BECOME A LUCKY BLOCK..
snippet.description:
Today I became a lucky block in roblox. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Wilbert Ross - Dulo Ng Pahina (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
#WilbertRoss #DuloNgPahina #VivaRecords
Wilbert Ross bares his heart in Aking Musika—his debut album that captures his journey as a singer-songwriter through stories of love, hope, and self-discovery. Featuring tracks like “Dulo Ng Pahina,” “Maliwanag Mong Mundo,” “Makaluma,” and fan favorites “LANGGA” and “Nakangiti,” the album blends sincerity with the timeless charm of OPM. Each song reflects Wilbert’s signature warmth and authenticity, making Aking Musika a deeply personal soundtrack of his life and artistry.

snippet.title: *NSYNC - This I Promise You (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿*NSYNC - This I Promise You (Lyrics)

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿Lyrics:

[Intro: Justin]
Oh oh oh oh
Oh ooh

[Verse 1: Justin]
When the visions around you
Bring tears to your eyes
And all that surrounds you
Are secrets and lies
I'll be your strength
I'll give you hope
Keeping your faith when it's gone
The one you should call
Was standing there all along

[Chorus: All & Justin]
And I will take you in my arms
And hold you right where you belong
'Til the day my life is through
This, I promise you
This, I promise you

[Verse 2: JC & All]
I've loved you forever
In lifetimes before
And I promise you never
Will you hurt anymore
I give you my word
I give you my heart (Give you my heart)
This is a battle we've won
And with this vow
Forever has now begun


[Chorus: All, Justin & JC]
Just close your eyes (Close your eyes)
Each loving day (Each loving day)
I know this feeling won't go away (No)
'Til the day my life is through
This, I promise you
This, I promise you

[Bridge: JC & All]
Over and over, I fall (Over and over, I fall)
When I hear you call
Without you in my life, baby
I just wouldn't be living at all

[Chorus: All & JC]
And I will take you in my arms (I will take you in my arms)
And hold you right where you belong (Right where you belong)
'Til the day my life is through
This, I promise you, babe
Just close your eyes
Each loving day (Each loving day)
I know this feeling won't go away (No)
Every word I say is true
This, I promise you

[Outro: Justin]
Every word I say is true
This, I promise you
Ooh, I promise you

snippet.title: Searching for 100 Players Who Went Missing
snippet.description:
Thousands of players have joined the Unstable SMP, but a small portion of those players have mysteriously disappeared, including my best friend. After finding out no one else was willing to solve this, I along with my teammate, JumperWho, made it our mission to find the missing players and hopefully reunite with my long lost friend...

Searching for 100 Players Who Went Missing


Unstable SMP Members
➜ @wemmbumc 
➜ @FlameFragsMC 
➜ @ParrotX2 
➜ @Spokeishere 





possible spoilers below this point

music: 
Christopher Larkin
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
Chris Christodoulou /  @AstronautDown  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell
Cameron 'Caero' Munoz
Johan Johnson
Peter Hont
Crispin Hands

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft.
